content: Just putting this here as well for more poor gameplay examples in Arc 1~ https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ahhl0e_v_LY

embeds.title: [Morimens] 1 MORE hour of chill Uvhash 72k Deep Dive to fall asleep to
embeds.description: Hi! Thought I'd record this as I haven't run this particular boss in Deep Dive for several weeks. I did have to restart battle on the boss fight due to my own mistakes, but I left it in as a "learning experience", feel free to skip ahead a little if you'd rather just see the final kill. Take care~

thread_title: An Uvhash Guide to Dealing Death and (perhaps) not Receiving It in Kind
